title: Slovakian Casserole
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired casserole made with roasted vegetables and tofu.

ingredients.name: roasted vegetables
ingredients.amount: 1 cup (any combination of carrots, zucchini, bell peppers)

ingredients.name: tempting cheese
ingredients.amount: 1 cup (any combination of cheddar, mozzarella, parmesan)

instructions: Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with olive oil.
Cut the roasted vegetables into 1-inch pieces and spread them at the bottom of the baking dish.
Place the tofu cubes on top of the vegetables.
Cut the slovakian bread into 1-inch cubes and sprinkle them over the tofu.
Sprinkle the tempting cheese over the bread.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
